prompt: Using evals/files/input-duplicates.graphql, scan for duplicate input object types with identical fields and types, merge only safe duplicates, and avoid any breaking changes to public API contracts.
expectations: Output treats input object types as a separate duplicate-detection category from object types.
Output avoids cross-kind merges (object to input or input to object).
Output flags any public-contract-breaking merge candidates as skipped pending explicit approval.
